name: com.ezg.core
description: Shared runtime foundation for EZG Unity projects: an asset-loading adapter (Resources / AssetBundle / Play Asset Delivery), reusable UI helper components (safe area, layout adjusters, scroll-snap, tween-move, curved/circle layouts, button extensions, jump-in/out animation), device/security helpers, common MonoBehaviour and Unity extension utilities, and shared color/enum/update-loop utilities.
